title: GATE Memory Request Envelope
description: Memory Gateway request envelope (read or write). v1.3 adds an optional quality_override that, when present, admits a retrieval through C18 by exception with a TTL and an approver.

request_hash.description: Hash of the canonicalised request payload. Used by C18 quality_decision and by ledger event correlation.

query.description: Read parameters (free-form, store-specific). Required when request_type is 'read'.

item.description: Item to write (memory_item.schema.json shape). Required when request_type is 'write'.

quality_override.description: Break-glass override for the C18 quality gate. When present, an otherwise-denied retrieval is admitted with the override metadata recorded in the quality_decision event.
